note: Parameters for the shared bootstrap-prompt template. Add a variant only for a plugin genuinely personalizable from thread history (currently Design Doctrine and Improve Prompt). Each `output` file is generated; hygiene fails if it drifts from the template + these values.

values.ADAPT_INSTRUCTION: Turn each durable signal into a versioned rule under rules/<domain>/ following governance.md, or clear rules/ first to grow doctrine from your own judgment. Leave the bundled design-doctrine skill in place; it reads whatever rules you keep. Rules carry short, anonymous evidence lines only.

Fold each durable signal into skills/prompt-shaper/SKILL.md — tighten a role's include-when, add or narrow a rule, or fix a stopping convention. Do not touch the composer runtime; only the skill changes. The plugin runtime and the skill are separate parts.
